nodes.label: Service Layer Pattern
nodes.contributor: rationale: Controllers never query DB directly; all business logic in *Service classes for testability and separation of concerns

nodes.label: UUID Primary Keys
nodes.contributor: rationale: Prevents ID enumeration and allows client-side ID generation

nodes.label: Polymorphic Relations
nodes.contributor: rationale: EntityCreator and Favorite use morphTo/morphOne so one table can reference multiple entity types (Market, Product)

nodes.label: Dual Role / Permission System
nodes.contributor: rationale: Two orthogonal systems (user_type for broad access, Spatie roles for granular functional roles) provide flexibility and clarity of role assignment

nodes.label: Guest Tracking via Device ID
nodes.contributor: rationale: Allows anonymous users to submit prices without an account using X-Device-ID header

nodes.label: Spatial Zones (PostGIS)
nodes.contributor: rationale: zones.coordinates stored as PostGIS Polygon; ZoneService::getZoneByCoordinates() resolves zone from lat/lng using spatial queries

nodes.label: Price Contribution Flow
nodes.contributor: rationale: Two-path design separates automated batch processing (primary) from admin manual override to maintain data integrity via DB transactions and threshold validation

nodes.label: Soft Deletes
nodes.contributor: rationale: Product, Category, Banner, Unit, PriceContribution use SoftDeletes to preserve audit trail

nodes.label: Slug Auto-Generation
nodes.contributor: rationale: Product and Market models auto-generate slugs in booted()/boot() hooks so callers never need to set slugs manually

nodes.label: API Standard Response Envelope
nodes.contributor: rationale: All responses use {success, message, data} envelope via formated_response() for consistency across all API endpoints

nodes.label: Dual Role System Implementation
nodes.contributor: rationale: user_type for broad category access, role_id for functional Spatie roles; provides flexibility, scalability, and backward compatibility
